title: AI Strategy & Operations Associate

But workplaceType is OnSite (no hybrid/remote flag) and the JD body states no day-count. Verified 2026-06-10.
working_week_note: RE-VERIFIED 2026-06-11 against the user's ACTUAL dealbreaker (weekend/6-7-day work only — OnSite 5-day Mon-Fri is FINE). Ashby posting-api: workplaceType='OnSite', isRemote=false. The JD body (re-fetched 2026-06-11, JS-rendered/empty via WebFetch; Ashby board also shows no schedule prose) states NO day-count and NO mention of weekends, Saturday, Sunday, or a 6/7-day week. 'OnSite' = in-office, NOT a 6/7-day week. Default to a standard Mon-Fri week. The prior IN-OFFICE 'likely dealbreaker' flag was WRONG (it conflated OnSite with weekend work). FINE — NOT a dealbreaker. Reinstated. (Separate live caveat unchanged: London is a SECONDARY location — confirm London eligibility before applying.)
company_context: AI-native 'Smart Financial Platform' replacing legacy ERPs — automated accounting, real-time reporting. Operating core for Lovable, Legora, KeyShot. Well-backed early team defining a new category.
momentum_flag: MODERATE — strong logos (Lovable/Legora as customers) and world-class backers, but no fresh raise tied to this posting and listing is ~9 weeks old
biggest_lever: 'Foundational hire... building foundational processes for the first time' across Finance, Legal/Compliance, People Ops, General Ops — a first-employee-style operator brief that matches Ryan's Minima FA breadth and fundraising-ops exposure.
biggest_risk: Two strikes: (1) recency — ~61 days old, may be filled or deprioritised; (2) location — London is only a SECONDARY location (Copenhagen primary), so London eligibility should be confirmed before investing effort. Also finance-ops leaning vs pure generalist.
apply_move: Confirm London eligibility first (message recruiter / check before applying). If confirmed, apply via Ashby leading with fundraising-ops + investor-update + budget-accountability evidence to address the finance-ops tilt.
availability_note: Re-verified LIVE via Ashby posting-api (light-inc) 2026-06-10; isListed=true, publishedAt unchanged 2026-04-09, 62 days. LONDON CONFIRMED still valid (location=Copenhagen primary, secondaryLocations=['London']). Aged posting; G 32->30. callback_op unchanged 63.
why_fits_operator_intent: Genuine cross-functional ops-generalist foundational seat (not sales/CS); included as a lower-confidence option due to recency and secondary-location caveats.

That raise is ~9 months old and is now driving the ENGINEERING/deployment hiring (consistent with the new Bank Integration Engineer req), NOT a fresh push on the Strategy & Ops Associate seat. active_hiring_signal.signal_note: COOL (the only sub-50 of the five): a textbook 'company is hot, this seat is cold' split. Light is unmistakably scaling — it posted a brand-new London engineering req TODAY and is hiring a Talent Acquisition Partner + People Partner — but the AI Strategy & Operations Associate seat itself has sat UNREFRESHED at its 2026-04-09 timestamp for 63 days while newer roles were published around it. Funding (Sep 2025) is old and is fuelling engineering/deployment, not this seat. Net: plausibly still open but NOT being actively pushed; the lack of a refresh amid active reposting is itself a soft 'lower-priority/possibly-cooling' tell. Confirm-live (and London eligibility) with the recruiter before treating this as a current opening.
